tasks.label: Arrange contents insurance from day one of tenancy
Terminate or move (if possible) existing broadbank account
Book broadband install for move-in day or shortly thereafter
tasks.dueText: 1+ month ahead, but might be blocked by existing active account

tasks.label: Arrange for moving-van access and parking permit (e.g. with council if on-street or with building management if available)
Set up Royal Mail post redirection
Update TV Licence
Collect all keys and fobs: front door, back door, windows, mailbox, communal, garage/parking, bin store, cycle store, alarm codes
Test every key/fob in every lock
Take date-stamped photos of gas, electricity, water and heating meters
tasks.dueText: Ensure that meter serial number is visible

tasks.label: Check if there's any debt from prior tenants if any of the meters is prepayment/key/card/PAYG
Take a video walkthrough of every room narrating and zooming-in on any defects
Photograph inside oven, fridge, freezer and its drawers, washing machine drum and seal, dishwasher filter
Photograph inside every cupboard, wardrobe, and drawer across all rooms
Photograph any damage across floors, walls, skirting, ceilings, doors, windows and  garden (scuffs, marks, scratches, stains, mould, chipped tiles, burns or empty spots)
Photograph all curtains, blinds and lampshades (fixed and portable)
Check inventory line by line against actual item condition -- note where condition is worse than stated or pictures not high enough resolution to show damage
Test all smoke alarms and CO alarms
Locate water stopcock, gas shut-off valve and consumer unit / fuse board
Test boiler, hot water, heating and every individual radiator
Run every tap (including outdoor and showers/baths) and flush every toilet
Test every hob ring, oven, extractor fan, microwave, kettle, and other provided kitchen appliances
Test all bulbs, including within extractor fan and workspace / countertop ligthing
Check every window opens, closes, and locks
Check for damp, mould, and pest evidence (droppings or smell behind furniture / major appliances)
Submit your own inventory ammendment with all comments and photos by email
Open or move accounts and submit meter readings to gas, electricity, heating, water and sewerage suppliers
Register for council tax with new local authority
Apply for single person discount if living alone
Apply for council tax student exemption if applicable
Apply for disabled discount if applicable
Apply for low-income discount if applicable
Update Child Benefit address if applicable
Update Universal Credit address if applicable
Update State Pension address if applicable
Register with a local NHS GP
Register with an NHS dentist
Update nominated pharmacy of new address for repeat prescription delivery
tasks.dueText: This can be done via GP, NHS app or the pharmacy directly

tasks.label: Set up standing order for rent
Update all banks, building societies, mortgage lenders, and credit cards of new address
Update ISA, investment, exchange, and brokerage accounts of new address
Update life insurance, critical illness, and income protection of new address
Update solicitor, accountant, and will/executor records of new address
Update DVLA driving licence address (free; £1000 fine if not done)
Update DVLA V5C vehicle log book
Update vehicle insurance address
Update Blue Badge permit address
Update workplace and personal pension providers of new address
Notify HMRC (Income Tax, National Insurance, Child Benefit, State Pension) of address change
Update Companies House registered office and director's service address if running a business
Update Disclosure and Barring Service (DBS) Update Service
Update Student Finance address if a student
Update vet records and microchip database (Petlog/Identibase) if you have pets
Register on the electoral roll
Update Gift Aid declarations with charities of new address
Update PayPal, Amazon, eBay and other frequently used online retailer default shipping addresses
Update gym and other subscription services (e.g. mobile provider) of new address
Receive Deposit protection Prescribed Information (confirm if deposit is protected in DPS, MyDeposits, or TDS)
Receive the How to Rent guide
Receive Energy Performance Certificate (EPC)
Receive Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)
Receive Gas Safety Certificate, if gas is connected
Check if property is in a selective licensing area and Landlord's license
tasks.dueText: Search '[council name] selective licensing'. If property is within the area, check current status of your Landlord's license.

tasks.label: Check if HMO licence is required and held (if 3+ unrelated tenants)
